site.title: Jehovah's Light
site.description: Light up the world with Jehovah's guiding light

hero.title: Jehovah's Light
hero.subtitle: Beacon of Hope for the World
hero.description: Each light represents a soul touched by Jehovah's love. Share your location and become part of this global beacon of faith.

geolocation.title: Share Your Light
geolocation.request: Allow location sharing to light up your position on Earth
geolocation.denied: Location access denied. You can still view the lights from around the world.
geolocation.error: Unable to get your location. Please try again.
geolocation.success: Your light has been added to the world!

lighthouse.title: A Lighthouse in the Darkness
lighthouse.verse: "The LORD is my light and my salvation— whom shall I fear?"

footer.verse: "For with you is the fountain of life; in your light we see light." — Psalm 36:9
